glue.schemaversion.schema.CfnAbout: A wrapper structure to contain schema identity fields. Either `SchemaArn`, or `SchemaName` and `RegistryName` has to be provided.

glue.schemaversion.schema.RegistryName.Description: The name of the registry where the schema is stored. Either `SchemaArn`, or `SchemaName` and `RegistryName` has to be provided.

glue.schemaversion.schema.SchemaArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schema. Either `SchemaArn`, or `SchemaName` and `RegistryName` has to be provided.

glue.schemaversion.schema.SchemaName.Description: The name of the schema. Either `SchemaArn`, or `SchemaName` and `RegistryName` has to be provided.
